mapper.select: SELECT * FROM admin_user WHERE username = #{username} AND deleted = 0
SELECT p.code FROM role_permission rp JOIN permission p ON p.id = rp.permission_id AND p.deleted = 0 WHERE rp.role_id = #{roleId} AND rp.deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE admin_user SET login_fail_count = 0, locked_until = NULL, last_login_time = #{loginTime}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE admin_user SET login_fail_count = login_fail_count + 1, locked_until = #{lockedUntil}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO admin_user(username, password, real_name, role_id, status, login_fail_count, create_time, update_time, deleted) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{realName}, #{roleId}, #{status}, #{loginFailCount}, NOW(), NOW(), 0)
